      "text": "Tew tad buhs us win-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,

      "text": "Un jums buhs to wiſfâs

tchanas Telti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad juhs tadeht ne neﬀti-

un jums ne buhs to Israëta Behr-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N tas KUNGS run-

"

    {

nas/ un kam nekahda Raite / un
"

    {

      "text": "Un jums buhs to Geleaſa-

    {
      "n": 4,

"

    {
      "n": 5,

      "text": "Un tad buhs wiꞥnam t

"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tam Preesteram buh-

"

    {
      "n": 7,

      "text": "Tad buhs tam Preesteram

"

    {
      "n": 8,
